title: A system and a method for collecting batches of food
abstract: The invention comprises a system for collecting batches of food from food suppliers. The system comprises at least one movable collecting unit with an associated data receiver; a food parameter determining system for determining at least one batch parameter of a collected food batch; a database system for storing food supplier data comprising at least one food collecting address identification for each food supplier, food receiver data comprising at least one food delivering address identification for each of at least one food receiver station and reference data comprising threshold data for said at least one batch parameter or derived parameter correlated to said batch parameter. The system further comprises a server system coupled to said database system and being in data communication with said data receiver. The server system receives at least data from the database system and batch parameter data and calculates logistic plan(s) for the movable collecting unit(s).
claims:
Claims PATENT CLAIMS 1. A system for collecting batches of food from food suppliers the system comprising â¢ at least one movable collecting unit comprising a collecting container for collecting batches of food and an associated data receiver for instructing a driver of the movable collecting unit; â¢ a food parameter determining system for determining at least one batch parameter of a collected food batch; â¢ a database system for storing food supplier data comprising at least one food collecting address identification for each food supplier, food receiver data comprising at least one food delivering address identification for each of at least one food receiver station and reference data comprising threshold data for said at least one batch parameter or derived parameter correlated to said batch parameter; Â· a server system coupled to said database system and being in data communication with said data receiver; wherein said food parameter determining system is configured for determining said at least one batch parameter of respective food batches consecutively as they are collected by the movable collecting unit and to transmit said determined batch parameter of said respective collected batches of food to said server system; said server system is programmed to - acquire supplier data from said database system; - consecutively receive said determined batch parameter of said respective collected batches of food; 

 - compare said consecutively received batch parameter and/or a derived parameter to said parameter reference data and if said batch parameter and/or a derived parameter exceeds a threshold data of said reference data; - calculate a logistic plan for each of the at least one movable collecting unit and o for each movable collecting unit determine if said server system comprises a valid logistic plan and if so determine if said calculated logistic plan differs from said valid logistic plan and if so i. deem said valid logistic plan to be a previous logistic plan, ii. store said calculated logistic plan as a valid logistic plan and iii. transmit said calculated logistic plan to said associated data receiver. 2. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 1, wherein said first mentioned valid logistic plan is a previous calculated logistic plan or a user provided logistic plan, e.g. fed to the server system via a user interface. 3. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 1 or claim 2, wherein said first mentioned valid logistic plan is a first logistic plan. 4. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 3, wherein said server system is configured for receiving a first logistic plan via a user interface and to store said first logistic plan as a valid logistic plan. 5. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 3, wherein said server system is programmed to acquire supplier data from said database system and to determine said first logistic plan comprising at least a first 

 collecting address identification for each of said at least one movable collecting unit(s). 6. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said server system is programmed to - for each movable collecting unit determine if said server system comprises a valid logistic plan, o if yes determine if said calculated logistic plan differs from said valid logistic plan and if so i. deem said valid logistic plan to be a previous logistic plan and ii. store said calculated logistic plan as a valid logistic plan and iii. transmit said calculated logistic plan to said associated data receiver. o if no, i. store said calculated logistic plan as a valid logistic plan and ii. transmit said calculated logistic plan to said associated data receiver. 7. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said server system is programmed to calculate said logistic plan for the at least one movable collecting unit based on the supplier data for the food batches to be collected and said consecutively received batch parameter and/or derived parameter. 8. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said server system is programmed to calculate said logistic plan for the at least one movable collecting unit based on the supplier data for the food batches to be collected and said consecutively received batch parameter and/or derived parameter and one or more previously received batch parameter and/or derived parameter or combinations thereof. 9. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said server system is programmed to calculate said logistic plan for the at least one movable collecting unit to optimize the quality and quantity of collected and delivered food. 10. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the said calculated logistic plan comprises at least a first collecting address identification and/or a food delivering address identification for said at least one movable collection unit, optionally said calculated logistic plan comprises a logistic order of collecting address identifications. 11. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said collecting address identification (s) comprise(s) an actual collection address or a code for an actual collection address, wherein said associated data receiver preferably is configured for recognizing said actual collection address from said code. 12. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food delivering address identification(s) comprise(s) an actual food delivering address or a code for an actual food delivering address, wherein said associated data receiver preferably is configured for recognizing said actual food delivering address from said code. 13. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food supplier data comprises previously supplied food data for at least one previously supplied batch, said previously 

 supplied food data preferably comprises at least one of date of supply, quantity and quality, wherein quality comprises at least one of temperature at collection, food composition, presence of contaminants and microbial data. 14 The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food supplier data comprises expected supplier food data for at least one food batch to be collected, said expected supplier food data preferably comprises at least one of expected quantity and expected quality, wherein the expected quality comprises at least one of expected temperature at collection, expected food composition, expected contaminations and expected microbial data. 15. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 14, wherein said server system is programmed to include said expected quantity and/or expected quality for food batches to be collected in the calculation of said logistic plan for the at least one movable collecting unit. 16. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food receiver data comprises food delivering address identification for each of one or more food receiver stations, wherein said one or more food receiver stations is a food processing station, a packing station, a market and/or a disposal station. 17. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food receiver data comprises a food receiver request for each of one or more food receiver stations, said food receiver request preferably comprises at least one of requested quantity and requested quality of one or more foods. 18. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food parameter determining system is configured for determining at least one of temperature at collection, food composition, presence of contaminants and microbial data. 19. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food parameter determining system is configured for determining at least one batch parameter, wherein the food parameter determining system preferably comprises a thermometer, a pH meter, a voltage meter, a microfluidic based food parameter determining system, a lateral flow based food parameter determining system, an optically based food parameter determining system, e.g. using fluorescence, or any combinations thereof. 20. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food parameter determining system is positioned on the movable collecting unit, said food parameter determining system is preferably configured for automatically transmitting said determined batch parameter to said server system. 21. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said food parameter determining system is configured for receiving a sample of a batch during collection and determining said at least one batch parameter. 22. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims 1-20, wherein said food parameter determining system is configured for acquiring a sample of a batch during collection and determining said at least one batch parameter. 23. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims 1-20, wherein said food parameter determining system is configured for determining said at least one batch parameter directly on the food batch during collection. 24. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said at least one batch parameter is selected from a quantity batch parameter and/or a quality batch parameter, preferably said food parameter determining system is configured for determining two or more 

 batch parameters, such as at least one quantity batch parameter and at least one quality batch parameter, such as at least volume, temperature and presence of contaminants. 25. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said at least one batch parameter comprises at least one quality batch parameter, preferably selected from temperature at collection, presence of contaminants, food composition and microbial data. 26. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said at least one movable collection unit is a vehicle, a ship or an airplane, preferably said at least one movable unit is a vehicle, such as a food motor transporter comprising at least one container such as a cooling container and/or a tank. 27. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said system comprises a plurality of movable collecting units, said plurality of movable collection units are equal or different in size and/or type. 28. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein each of said at least one movable collecting unit comprises a positioning system, such as a global positioning system (GPS), configured for acquiring position data of said respective movable collection unit, wherein said position data comprises at least a present position of said respective movable collection unit. 29. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 28, wherein said system is configured for transmitting position data of said at least one movable collection unit to said server system, said server system is preferably configured for acquiring said position data of said at least one movable collection unit from said positioning system and/or said food parameter determining system is configured for acquiring said position data of said at least one movable collection unit to said server system and 

 transmitting said positioning data to said server system together with said determined batch parameter. 30. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 29, wherein said server system is programmed to include said positioning data of said movable unit(s) in the calculation of said logistic plan for the at least one movable collecting unit. 31. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said associated data receiver is fixed to said movable collection unit or said associated data receiver is a portable unit, such as a handheld device, such as a cell phone and/or a tablet. 32. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said associated data receiver is configured for receiving a valid logistic plan from said server system, storing said received valid logistic plan and deeming previously received and stored valid logistic plan(s) to be previous logistic plan(s). 33. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 29, wherein said associated data receiver is configured to display at least a next collecting address or delivering address of said valid logistic plan visually and/or audibly to a driver of said movable collection unit, and where said valid logistic plan comprises several collecting addresses and optionally a delivering address, said associated data receiver is preferably configured for displaying said collecting addresses and optional delivering address visually and/or audibly to a driver of said movable collection unit, more preferably said associated data receiver is configured for displaying said collecting addresses and optional delivering address all together and/or in a logistic order. 34. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said server is programmed to calculate a derived batch parameter from said at least one batch parameter, wherein said derived batch parameter preferably is a calculation of microbial data and/or 

 contamination data and/or quantity data at a present or future point of time based on known, expected and/ or estimated data, such as temperature data, quantity data, pH data and/or combinations thereof, optionally the derived batch parameter is a derived batch parameter for said batch or for a mixture of batches comprising said batch, such as a mixture comprising collected batches. 35. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims wherein said food batches comprise food batches of solid food and/or batches of liquid food such as batches of meat, corn, vegetables, dairy and/or juice. 36. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims wherein said food batches are liquid food batches, such as batches of milk or juice. 37. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 36, wherein two or more food batches are mixed to form a batch mixture upon collection, said food parameter determining system further is configured for determining at least one batch mixture parameter after each addition of an additional batch to said batch mixture. 38. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims wherein said server system is configured for receiving additional data correlated to one or more batches, one or more food suppliers, one or more food receiver stations and/or one or more reference data via a user interface. 39. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims wherein said server system is configured for receiving food supplier data, food receiver data and/or reference data and for storing said received food supplier data, food receiver data and/or reference data onto said database system. 40. The system for collecting batches of food according to any one of the preceding claims wherein said database system is configured for storing movable collecting unit data for movable collecting units of the system, said movable collecting unit data preferably comprises the type of movable collecting unit, load capacity of said movable collecting unit, operation plan and/or status of said movable collecting unit, said operation plan preferably comprises a plan of when the movable collecting unit is to be active and/or inactive. 41. The system for collecting batches of food according to claim 40, wherein said server system is configured for acquiring supplier data from said database system and classifying said movable collecting units of the system as active or inactive, preferably said movable collecting unit are classified as active or inactive by user(s), such as by the driver(s) of one or more of the respective movable collecting unit(s). 42. A method of controlling batches of food from food suppliers, the method comprising â¢ providing a system according to any one of the preceding claims, â¢ loading data to the database system comprising food supplier data comprising at least one food collecting address identification for each food supplier, food receiver data comprising at least one delivering address identification for each of at least one food receiver station and reference data comprising threshold data for said at least one batch parameter or derived parameter correlated to said batch parameter; and Â· instructing driver(s) of the movable collecting unit to follow the logistic plan provided via the associated data receiver. 43. The method of controlling batches of food according to claim 42, wherein the data to the database system is fed to the database system via the server system, preferably said data is fed to the server system by at least 

 one user interface in data communication with the server system, e.g. via the internet. 44. The method of controlling batches of food according to claim 42, wherein the data to the database system is fed to the database system by suppliers and/or receivers. 45. The method of controlling the collecting of batches of food according to any one of claims 42-44, wherein the server system is configured for classifying said movable collecting units of the system as active or inactive, said method comprising checking in said at least one movable collecting unit by transmitting a signal to said server system for classifying said at least one movable collecting unit as an active movable collecting unit, said signal preferably further comprises time data for the time in which the movable collecting unit is to remain being classified as an active movable collecting unit. 46. The method of controlling the collecting of batches of food according to any one of claims 42-45, wherein the method comprises delivering said collected food batches to receiver stations, preferably the method comprises collecting batches of liquid food, such as milk and/or juice. 47. The method of controlling the collecting of batches of food according to any one of claims 42-46, wherein the method comprises instructing the server system to determine a supplier profile for food delivered to said respective receiver stations, said supplier profile preferably comprises a list of food suppliers with each food supplier associated to an amount of delivered food originating from a collected batch of said respective food supplier. 48. The method of controlling the collecting of batches of food according to any one of claims 42-47, wherein the method comprises instructing the server system to calculate a price for delivered food for each receiver stations depending on the supplier profile for food delivered to said respective receiver 

 stations and the batch parameter(s) of each of the respective batches from where the delivered food originates. 49. The method of controlling the collecting of batches of food according to any one of claims 42-48, wherein the method comprises instructing the server system to calculate a payment for collected batches for each supplier depending on the amount and the batch parameter of each of the respective collected batches from each supplier.
